title: Bug: accessing parameters by upward hierarchial name

features.name: upward_hierarchical_parameter_reference_in_hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a parameterized child module that references its parent module's parameter via upward hierarchical name, used with vlog95 backend

features.name: multiple_parameterized_module_instantiations
features.description: Code should include multiple instantiations of the same parameterized module with different parameter values, where child modules use upward hierarchical references
